## Checklist

- [ ] If adding/modifying a skill: ran `/qualify` and pasted the decision above
- [ ] Checked overlap against every existing `skills/*/SKILL.md`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` skills table (if skill list changed)
- [ ] Skill body is as compact as possible
